R0250.title: Edge Function Configuration Abuse
R0250.definition: Misconfigured edge functions or WAF rules cause authentication bypass, data forwarding, or traffic hijacking.
R0250.description: Misconfigured edge functions or WAF rules cause authentication bypass, data forwarding, or traffic hijacking.
R0250.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
